text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after Agnes Digital has a number of
victories under her belt...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Don't you think it's about time we set a date?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
We've seen Umas laugh, we've seen Umas cry, all
about a million times over by now. It's about time
we build some new memories.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
What am I "talking about?!" I'm talking about our
hot spring vacation! Remember the coupon we
won at the start of this year?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You said after we finished our third year in the
Twinkle Series, we could go and have a nonstop
Horsegirl talk session!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I haven't forgotten, of course. I suppose this is
just about the perfect time.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
W-wait. That's it? You'll go? ...I mean, I'm happy
and all, I just didn't expect such an instant "okay,"
but um...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: B-but this is you we're talking about! I'm sure we'll have plenty of stories to talk the night away. Right?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure what she's nervous about this time,
but we end up taking a train to the hot spring.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Gulp... Chatting... just the two of us...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: It'll be okay. Of course it'll be okay... Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rattle, rattle, rattle!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Heeeeere's Digitan! Now let's get this heated
Horsegirl debate started!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I settle in for a chat with a frighteningly
passionate Agnes Digital.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hahahaha! That's so true! Hehe, the clumsy way
Doto made her move..

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Just thinking about it makes me... Drool... Which reminds me—
choice_data_list:
Um, don't you think it's about time we get some
food?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Food? We haven't moved onto that topic
yet.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ohhhhh, wow! It's dinner time already?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Time really flew by there, right?! It's like it was
stolen from right under our noses...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Sheesh, Digital! Look at how you lost yourself in
that chat...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I knew I was just worrying over nothing. There was
never any reason to be scared...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Well...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After some hesitation, Agnes Digital continues.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Even though we have so much in common, I
couldn't help but get a little nervous. I mean, it's
a hot spring trip...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Like, what if we found out we're into different
types of waifu, and then it gets all awkward and
quiet?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
As soon as I started worrying about that, my
social skills went out the window...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But still! Once we got yapping, it's like I couldn't
stop! We're not even close to covering
everything.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Do you know how rare and miraculous this is?
How exhilarating?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I never thought this day would come. Y'know
what I mean?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Finally... I found someone I can really relate to.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems that Agnes Digital was worried we'd run
out of things to talk about.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Wh-wh-where is that line from?! I don't
think I've seen that movie!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Busting a line out like that like it's nothing... Talk
about a silver tongue...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But if that's how you are, I get the feeling we've
got a lot more to talk about!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, we resume our enjoyable
conversation.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ohhhhh... That was when I debuted, right? It def was! You remember, right?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ew, ew, ew! Pleeease forget you ever saw that!
That was a dark moment, and some things aren't
meant to be remembered!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Wait.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
...When did the conversation switch from
Umamusume to me? And why?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Why is the conversation still going on like it's perfectly normal? Have I transformed into some kinda social butterfly or something?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I totally have! For sure! I used to be a superfan
that lived and breathed Umamusume. It's the only
thing I could talk about...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But now it's like... whatever. Anything is okay.
And if you're okay with me as I actually am...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ohhhh! I can't stop talking about myself! There's
so much I wanna tell you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, Agnes Digital's personal stories start
flooding out as if from a broken dam. She's never
opened up like this before.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Agnes Digital and I have formed an
irreplaceable bond during this time together.
